query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resolution_votes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  resolution_id INT NOT NULL,
  board_member_id INT NOT NULL,
  vote ENUM('for', 'against', 'abstain') NOT NULL,
  voted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  FOREIGN KEY (resolution_id) REFERENCES board_resolutions(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (board_member_id) REFERENCES board_members(id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_vote (resolution_id, board_member_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resolution_votes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  resolution_id INT NOT NULL,
  board_member_id INT NOT NULL,
  vote ENUM('for', 'against', 'abstain') NOT NULL,
  voted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  FOREIGN KEY (resolution_id) REFERENCES board_resolutions(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (board_member_id) REFERENCES board_members(id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_vote (resolution_id, board_member_id)
);
